name: Yataklete Kilkil (Spiced Vegetables)
recipeIngredient: 5 large Carrots, sliced into small rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. If the potatoes are very small, leave them whole; if not, quarter them.
2. Remove the tough outer fibers from the broccoli stalk and chop it.
3. Steam the potatoes, broccoli stem, carrots, and cauliflower over boiling water for 10 minutes.
4. Add the broccoli florets and steam for a few more minutes until vegetables are just tender.
5. In a heavy skillet, sauté the onions in half the ghee until they become transparent.
6. Mix in the steamed vegetables (excluding the broccoli florets) and cover. Cook for 6 to 8 minutes, stirring frequently.
7. Add the broccoli and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
8. Heat any remaining ghee and serve with injera.
